gaps.title: Set FRONTEND_URL on Render
gaps.description: Backend FRONTEND_URL defaults to http://localhost:3000. This breaks email links (verification, password reset, dunning), OAuth redirect validation, and CORS headers in production.
gaps.evidence: backend/config/settings.py:213 — frontend_url: str = Field(default='http://localhost:3000', validation_alias='FRONTEND_URL') with TODO comment
gaps.suggestedFix: Set FRONTEND_URL=https://rateshift.app in Render dashboard > Environment
gaps.verification: curl -s https://api.rateshift.app/health | jq .frontend_url should return https://rateshift.app. Send test password reset email and verify link domain.

gaps.title: Render free tier cold starts
gaps.description: Render free tier auto-sleeps after 15min idle. First visitor after sleep waits 20-30s. On Product Hunt launch day, this creates a terrible first impression for early visitors.
gaps.evidence: docs/CAPACITY_AUDIT.md — Risk rated CRITICAL. keepalive.yml mitigates but doesn't eliminate (hourly only, gaps possible).
gaps.suggestedFix: Upgrade to Render Starter ($7/mo) in dashboard, or accept risk with keepalive mitigation
gaps.verification: Backend stays warm between requests with no 20-30s delays

gaps.title: Resend email capacity for launch day
gaps.description: Resend free tier caps at 100 emails/day. Conservative launch scenario (100 signups) exceeds this. Gmail SMTP fallback adds ~500/day buffer but is not reliable for transactional email at scale.
gaps.evidence: docs/CAPACITY_AUDIT.md — Risk rated CRITICAL for Scenario B (500 signups = 600 emails).
gaps.suggestedFix: Upgrade to Resend Starter ($20/mo) or accept risk with Gmail SMTP fallback
gaps.verification: Resend dashboard shows Starter plan. Send test batch of 10 emails.

gaps.title: Google OAuth incomplete
gaps.description: Google OAuth Client ID exists in GCP but the client secret was never captured (GCP permanently hashes secrets after dialog dismissed). Google login button exists conditionally but will fail with placeholder secret.
gaps.evidence: backend/config/secrets.py:68-69 maps google_client_id and google_client_secret. Render has GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID/SECRET as placeholder values.
gaps.suggestedFix: Create new OAuth client in GCP Console > APIs & Services > Credentials. Download JSON immediately. Set GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID and GOOGLE_CLIENT_SECRET on Render.
gaps.verification: Test Google OAuth login flow end-to-end. NEXT_PUBLIC_OAUTH_GOOGLE_ENABLED shows Google button.

gaps.title: Launch checklist not walked through
gaps.completionNote: Walked through all sections. Checked off all product readiness, infrastructure (except GA4), product polish, and team coordination items with codebase evidence. Left unchecked: GA4 analytics, content assets, social media, PH page setup, launch-day execution items, post-launch items.
gaps.description: docs/LAUNCH_CHECKLIST.md has 587 lines of checklist items — all unchecked. Much of the underlying work is complete but the checklist has never been formally verified. This creates risk of missing pre-launch actions.
gaps.evidence: Every checkbox in the file is - [ ] (unchecked)
gaps.suggestedFix: Walk through each section, check items that are done, create tasks for items that aren't

gaps.title: GA4 analytics not configured
gaps.description: Launch checklist requires GA4 event tracking for signup, login, forecast, switch, upgrade. No gtag, NEXT_PUBLIC_GA, or Google Analytics integration found in frontend codebase.
gaps.evidence: grep for GA4/gtag/google.*analytics returned zero matches in frontend
gaps.suggestedFix: Add GA4 script tag to root layout, configure events for key user actions
gaps.verification: GA4 real-time dashboard shows events from test clicks

gaps.title: Missing Render environment variables
gaps.description: 6 environment variables on Render are missing or placeholder: GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID/SECRET (placeholder), UTILITYAPI_KEY (missing), GMAIL_CLIENT_ID/SECRET (missing), OUTLOOK_CLIENT_ID/SECRET (missing). These affect Google OAuth, UtilityAPI sync, and email scanning features.
gaps.suggestedFix: Obtain each credential from respective services and set on Render dashboard

gaps.title: Natural Gas dashboard tab shows 'coming soon'
gaps.completionNote: Added natural_gas: GasRatesContent to UTILITY_DASHBOARDS with lazy-load dynamic import in UtilityTabShell.tsx. Test updated.
gaps.description: The natural_gas key exists in DashboardTabs but is NOT in the UTILITY_DASHBOARDS map, so UtilityTabShell renders 'Dashboard coming soon.' Meanwhile, GasRatesContent component exists at the standalone /gas-rates page.
gaps.evidence: frontend/components/dashboard/UtilityTabShell.tsx:37-43 — map only has electricity, heating_oil, propane, water, community_solar. frontend/components/gas/GasRatesContent.tsx exists.
gaps.suggestedFix: Add natural_gas: GasRatesContent (or a new NaturalGasDashboard wrapper) to UTILITY_DASHBOARDS in UtilityTabShell.tsx. Add lazy-load dynamic import.
gaps.verification: Navigate to dashboard, select Natural Gas tab — shows real content, not placeholder

gaps.title: Beta signup page still accessible
gaps.completionNote: Deleted frontend/app/(app)/beta-signup/ directory (page.tsx, loading.tsx, error.tsx) and corresponding test file. API endpoint left intact (harmless).
gaps.description: (app)/beta-signup/page.tsx is still accessible and posts to /api/v1/beta/signup. For public launch, this should either be removed or redirect to the main signup page.
gaps.suggestedFix: Either delete the page entirely, or add a redirect to /auth/signup in middleware.ts
gaps.verification: Navigating to /beta-signup redirects to signup or returns 404

gaps.title: Email connection 'not yet available' message
gaps.completionNote: Changed 503 fallback to 'temporarily unavailable -- please try again later or use bill upload' in EmailConnectionFlow.tsx.
gaps.description: EmailConnectionFlow shows 'Email connection is not yet available. Please try bill upload instead.' on 503 responses. If email connections ARE working for Pro/Business users, this fallback message is misleading.
gaps.suggestedFix: Update message to clarify that this is a temporary service issue, or remove if backend always returns proper errors
gaps.verification: Test email connection flow as Pro user; confirm no 'not yet available' message

gaps.title: Direct login 'not yet available' message
gaps.completionNote: Changed 503 fallback to 'temporarily unavailable -- please try again later or use bill upload' in DirectLoginForm.tsx.
gaps.description: DirectLoginForm shows 'Direct utility connection is not yet available' on 503. Same issue as LG-003.
gaps.suggestedFix: Update message or remove if backend handles gracefully
gaps.verification: Test direct login flow as Pro user

gaps.title: Status page not created
gaps.description: docs/LAUNCH_CHECKLIST.md references rateshift.statuspage.io and launch emails reference a status page. Neither exists.
gaps.evidence: Launch checklist mentions status page; URL not configured
gaps.suggestedFix: Create status page on Statuspage.io, Better Uptime, or similar. Configure monitors for backend, frontend, CF Worker.
gaps.verification: Status page URL loads and shows all systems green

gaps.title: MVP launch checklist stale
gaps.completionNote: Updated header with current counts (7,390 tests, 58 tables, 63 migrations) and marked as historical document.
gaps.description: docs/MVP_LAUNCH_CHECKLIST.md header says test counts are from 2026-03-04 (3,395 tests). Current count is 7,390. Other numbers (tables, migrations) are also outdated.
gaps.evidence: Line 3 note says 'Current counts (2026-03-16): Backend 2,480...' — even this update is stale
gaps.suggestedFix: Update header note with current counts, or add banner that this is a historical document

gaps.title: Content assets (screenshots, video) not verified
gaps.description: Launch checklist requires 4-6 gallery screenshots, hero image, logo, and optional demo video. No evidence these have been created.
gaps.evidence: docs/LAUNCH_CHECKLIST.md Content Assets section all unchecked
gaps.suggestedFix: Create screenshots of dashboard, forecast, suppliers, pricing, mobile view. Create hero image. Prepare logo (500x500 PNG).
gaps.verification: All content assets uploaded to PH draft page

gaps.title: Native window.confirm for account deletion
gaps.completionNote: Replaced window.confirm() with <Modal variant="danger"> from components/ui/modal. Tests updated to use modal interaction (click Delete Account button in dialog).
gaps.description: Account deletion in Settings uses window.confirm() instead of a custom confirmation modal. Functional but not polished.
gaps.suggestedFix: Replace with custom Dialog/Modal component (already in components/ui/)
gaps.verification: Account deletion shows styled modal, not browser native dialog

gaps.title: No background job queue
gaps.description: The full-gap-remediation PRD called for arq-based async task queue for bill uploads and email scanning. Not implemented — bill uploads are synchronous, email scanning is cron-triggered.
gaps.evidence: Grep for arq/celery/dramatiq returned zero files
gaps.suggestedFix: Defer — current approach works at launch scale. Revisit at 200+ DAU.

gaps.title: Social media accounts not verified
gaps.description: Launch checklist requires Twitter account active, LinkedIn profile updated, 7 launch tweets drafted. Cannot verify from codebase.
gaps.suggestedFix: Create/verify social media accounts, draft launch tweets
gaps.verification: All social accounts accessible and content drafted

gaps.title: Missing UTILITYAPI_KEY credential
gaps.description: UTILITYAPI_KEY is missing from Render. This affects UtilityAPI sync. For launch, bill upload and portal scraping are the primary connection methods — this can be deferred.
gaps.suggestedFix: Obtain API key from UtilityAPI and set on Render

gaps.title: Missing Gmail and Outlook connection credentials
gaps.description: GMAIL_CLIENT_ID/SECRET and OUTLOOK_CLIENT_ID/SECRET are missing from Render. These affect email scanning features. For launch, bill upload is the primary connection method — these can be deferred.
gaps.suggestedFix: Create OAuth apps in Google Cloud Console and Azure Portal, set credentials on Render
gaps.verification: Gmail and Outlook email scanning tested end-to-end
